titleZh: 新《公司法》下董事作为清算义务人的责任与风险
titleEn: Liabilities and Risks of Directors as Obligors of Liquidation under the New Company Law
abstractZh: 重点说明董事被界定为清算义务人的法条衔接、义务启动条件及清算阶段可能承担的责任。
abstractEn: A practical guide to board liabilities once liquidation obligation roles are triggered under the revised law.
